dataset.name: Tshwane South TVET College Programmes
dataset.source_type: Official TSC programme pages supplied by user
dataset.important_note: TVET matching should not rely on APS alone. Qualification level, prior subjects, preceding N-level or NC(V) level, campus, intake cycle, selection tests and occupational requirements must be evaluated.

decision_order: Check highest grade or qualification completed
Check whether the learner has the preceding NC(V) or NATED level
Check required subjects and minimum marks when confirmed
Return manual_review instead of making an unsupported rejection

qualification_type_logic.NC(V): Usually starts at Level 2 and progresses annually through Levels 3 and 4.
qualification_type_logic.NATED / Report 191: Usually progresses from N4 to N6. Engineering commonly runs by trimester; business, tourism and hospitality commonly run by semester.
qualification_type_logic.Occupational Certificate: Match against the exact QCTO curriculum and entry rule. Workplace learning and an external assessment may be compulsory.
qualification_type_logic.Short / Bridging Programme: Do not assume it leads directly to a national qualification; store its purpose and progression link separately.

confidence_labels.confirmed: Explicitly stated by an official current source
confidence_labels.inferred: Derived from programme naming or standard qualification structure
confidence_labels.unverified: Must be checked before automatic eligibility decisions

admission.requirements_verification_status: not fully extractable from programme page

matching_rules.typical_entry_guidance: Usually aimed at learners who completed Grade 9 or higher, but the college's current admission rules must be checked.
matching_rules.progression: Learner normally progresses one level at a time after passing the preceding NC(V) level.

manual_review_required_when: The programme page does not state a clear minimum requirement
The learner is applying above the first level without prior results
A trade programme requires workplace placement, medical fitness or an aptitude assessment
Campus or intake availability is uncertain

duration.notes: Derive from the qualification structure only after confirming the current TSC prospectus.

funding.notes: Funding depends on NSFAS eligibility, programme funding status and current college rules.

required_documents_typical: Certified identity document
Latest school results or qualification results
Proof of residence
Parent or guardian identity document where applicable

data_quality.qualification_structure: confirmed from page title or programme listing where available; otherwise inferred from URL
data_quality.campus_data: confirmed where surfaced by TSC programme listing; otherwise left empty
data_quality.admission_requirements: requires verification from the current official prospectus or application portal

admission.requirements_verification_status: not fully extractable from programme page

matching_rules.typical_entry_guidance: N4 commonly follows Grade 12 or a relevant NC(V) Level 4. N5 and N6 require the preceding N-level subjects.
matching_rules.progression: N4 → N5 → N6, subject to passing the required subjects at each level.
matching_rules.national_diploma_note: A National N Diploma generally requires completion of N4-N6 plus the prescribed workplace experience; verify current DHET rules.

manual_review_required_when: The programme page does not state a clear minimum requirement
The learner is applying above the first level without prior results
A trade programme requires workplace placement, medical fitness or an aptitude assessment
Campus or intake availability is uncertain
